title: cicca obovata
intro: Cicca obovata, also known as the wood apple or elephant apple, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. Cicca obovata is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
